title: Slight
description: very light shader that improves visuals
body:
Slight is a shader pack that improves the visuals of 
terrain with shadows, 
water with waves, 
skies with 3 colors for all different times, 
emissive textures from light sources, 
leaves, flowers and mobs that have subsurface scattering, 
reflective materials,
end and nether support,
and other features
